name: @core0-io/ffwd-agent-guard
description: FFWD AgentGuard — Security and observability for AI coding agents. Dynamic guard, static scan, OTEL collector.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist plugins/claude-code/skills/ffwd-agent-guard/scripts && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node_modules/.bin/esbuild dist/adapters/openclaw-plugin.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=plugins/openclaw/plugin.js --external:node:* --banner:js="import { createRequire as __ffwdCreateRequire } from 'module'; const require = __ffwdCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/scripts/scanner-hook.ts src/scripts/guard-hook.ts src/scripts/collector-hook.ts src/scripts/action-cli.ts src/scripts/config-cli.ts --bundle --splitting --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=plugins/claude-code/skills/ffwd-agent-guard/scripts --external:node:* --banner:js="import { createRequire as __ffwdCreateRequire } from 'module'; const require = __ffwdCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" && node scripts/sync-shared.js
scripts.release:publish: node scripts/release.js all && gh release create v$npm_package_version releases/*.zip --title "v$npm_package_version" --generate-notes

author: core0-io
